title: design-apply manifest
description: Per-surface plan + status for the /design-apply conductor. Resumable across sessions. Written by `/design-apply ingest` then enriched by `/design-apply plan`.

source.description: path of the design artifact under docs/design (or unzipped temp)

target.description: route hash or pwa/views/<x>.js; null until plan resolves it

catalog_components.description: CATALOG component names this surface maps to

needs_component.description: scenario string when a shape has no CATALOG row — apply must run /component new first

token_reconciliation.description: foreign value -> nearest companygraph token, or a proposed design-system.yaml retune

touched_files.description: every file the apply step edited — drives conformance + revert

waivers.description: explicit user waivers, either `<rule>` or `<relpath>:<rule>`. Recorded only with a written user override in the run-log.
